questions.title: Custom Questions
questions.heading: Custom Questions
questions.new_placeholder: e.g. What is your T-shirt size?
questions.edit.no_answers: No answers yet. Add at least 2 answer options.
questions.delete.heading: Delete Question
questions.delete.warning: This will permanently delete the question, all its answers, and all attendee responses.
questions.delete.confirm_prompt: To delete this question, type its text "{text}" into the box below:
questions.edit_answer.title: Edit Answer
questions.edit_answer.heading: Edit Answer
questions.edit_answer.times_selected: Selected {count} {count, plural, one {time} other {times}} across all bookings.
questions.edit_answer.running_totals_not: This is a running total; edit it for imports or corrections. Accuracy is not guaranteed.
questions.edit_answer.mismatch_title: Answer selection total does not match attendee answers.
questions.edit_answer.mismatch_explanati: Expected values come from attendee answer rows. Got values are the stored running total. Normal attendee changes keep these aligned; recalculate the stored total before relying on it for reporting.
questions.recalculate.heading: Recalculate: {text}
questions.recalculate.description: Compare the stored selection total with the total counted from attendee answers. Select only the stored values you want to replace.
questions.recalculate.choose: Choose at least one total to recalculate
questions.edit_answer.modifier_hint: Applies an "answer"-triggered modifier whenever a buyer picks this answer. Create one on the Modifiers page first.
questions.delete_answer.title: Delete Answer
questions.delete_answer.heading: Delete Answer
questions.delete_answer.warning: This will permanently delete the answer "{answerText}" from the question "{questionText}" and remove all attendee responses for it.
questions.delete_answer.confirm_prompt: To delete this answer, type its text "{text}" into the box below:
questions.listing.heading: Questions for {listing}
questions.listing.no_questions: No questions created yet. Create questions first.
